LAW AND MOTION 301, RE: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF STIPULATED AGREEMENT IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. PLAINTIFF MAY SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,484. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Agreement
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Agreement.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for entry of judgment pursuant to terms of stipulated agreement is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Plaintiff may submit a proposed judgment in the amount of $4,484.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
